_description: Copy this file to config.json and modify values as needed. All fields are optional - missing values will use defaults.

server._host_desc: Bind address: 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces, 127.0.0.1 for localhost only
server._video_dir_desc: Root directory containing video files. Use absolute path or relative to server.

playback._speeds_desc: Available playback speed options. Values must be positive numbers.
playback._skip_duration_desc: Seconds to skip forward/backward when using the skip buttons. Default: 10

logging._level_desc: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR. Use DEBUG for troubleshooting.
logging._max_bytes_desc: Maximum log file size in bytes before rotation. Default: 104857600 (100 MB)
logging._backup_count_desc: Number of backup log files to keep. Default: 10

ui._controls_hide_delay_desc: Time in milliseconds before hiding controls in fullscreen mode when mouse is idle. Default: 3000 (3 seconds)
